## Downloads

| Platform | File |
|----------|------|
| Android (arm64) | `androidApp-arm64-v8a-release.apk` |
| Android (Universal) | `androidApp-universal-release.apk` |
| Windows (Installer) | `SakayoriMusic-X.Y.Z.msi` |
| Windows (Portable) | `SakayoriMusic-X.Y.Z.exe` |
| Linux (Debian) | `sakayorimusic_X.Y.Z_amd64.deb` |
| Linux (RPM) | `sakayorimusic-X.Y.Z.x86_64.rpm` |
| macOS (Intel) | `SakayoriMusic-X.Y.Z-x64.dmg` |
| macOS (Apple Silicon) | `SakayoriMusic-X.Y.Z-arm64.dmg` |

## Installation Notes

### Windows
When running the installer for the first time, Windows SmartScreen may show a warning because the app is not signed with an Extended Validation certificate. Click **More info** → **Run anyway**.

### Linux
For Debian/Ubuntu: `sudo dpkg -i sakayorimusic_X.Y.Z_amd64.deb`
For Fedora/RHEL: `sudo rpm -i sakayorimusic-X.Y.Z.x86_64.rpm`

### macOS
First launch may require going to **System Settings** → **Privacy & Security** → **Open Anyway**.

## System Requirements

- **Android:** 8.0 (API 26) or higher
- **Windows:** 10 or 11 (64-bit)
- **Linux:** Ubuntu 20.04+, Fedora 34+, or equivalent
- **macOS:** 11.0 (Big Sur) or higher
